zh-CN.title: 职业环境中的先分析，后感受
zh-CN.typical_response: 当你评估一个角色、团队或长期工作节奏是否适合自己时，不要问“我适合什么职业”，而要问这个环境会放大你的哪种情绪成本。
zh-CN.strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.better_move: 观察这个环境的人际密度、反馈强度、冲突频率和恢复空间。
zh-CN.micro_script: “这个环境会长期要求我承接什么？我有没有恢复和边界空间？”
zh-CN.reflection_question: 这次场景里，你最想保护的是事实、关系、还是自己的恢复空间？

en.title: Analytical Before Feeling in career environment
en.typical_response: When you are assessing whether a role, team, or work rhythm fits you long term, the question is not which job fits you. It is which environment will amplify or support this emotional pattern.
en.strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.better_move: Observe the interpersonal density, feedback intensity, conflict frequency, and recovery space in the environment.
en.micro_script: “What would this environment ask me to carry over time, and is there room for recovery and boundaries?”
en.reflection_question: In this situation, what were you trying to protect: the facts, the relationship, or your own recovery space?

en.title: Empathy-to-Action Gap in career environment
en.typical_response: When you are assessing whether a role, team, or work rhythm fits you long term, the question is not which job fits you. It is which environment will amplify or support this emotional pattern.
en.strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.better_move: Observe the interpersonal density, feedback intensity, conflict frequency, and recovery space in the environment.
en.micro_script: “What would this environment ask me to carry over time, and is there room for recovery and boundaries?”
en.reflection_question: In this situation, what were you trying to protect: the facts, the relationship, or your own recovery space?
en.reflection_prompt: In this situation, what were you trying to protect: the facts, the relationship, or your own recovery space?

zh-CN.typical_response: 当你评估一个角色、团队或长期工作节奏是否适合自己时，不要问“我适合什么职业”，而要问这个环境会放大你的哪种情绪成本。
zh-CN.strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.better_move: 观察这个环境的人际密度、反馈强度、冲突频率和恢复空间。
zh-CN.micro_script: “这个环境会长期要求我承接什么？我有没有恢复和边界空间？”
zh-CN.reflection_question: 这次场景里，你最想保护的是事实、关系、还是自己的恢复空间？

en.title: Regulated but Private in career environment
en.typical_response: When you are assessing whether a role, team, or work rhythm fits you long term, the question is not which job fits you. It is which environment will amplify or support this emotional pattern.
en.strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.better_move: Observe the interpersonal density, feedback intensity, conflict frequency, and recovery space in the environment.
en.micro_script: “What would this environment ask me to carry over time, and is there room for recovery and boundaries?”
en.reflection_question: In this situation, what were you trying to protect: the facts, the relationship, or your own recovery space?

en.title: Protective Distance in conflict
en.typical_response: When a disagreement gets tense and both sides want to prove their point, you may use your default pattern to protect either the relationship or yourself. Its strength is: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource. The cost may be: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.

eq.scene.feedback.analytical_under_feeli.rendering_use: EQResultV5 reality scene card and Agent follow-up prompts

zh-CN.title: 反馈中的先分析，后感受
zh-CN.typical_response: 当别人指出问题、要求修改，或评价你的表现时，你的第一反应可能会被“你倾向先整理逻辑，情绪可能在之后才追上来。”影响。你可能先注意到语气、期待或失望，再去处理具体信息。
zh-CN.strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。

zh-CN.typical_response: 当一段高压沟通或高互动工作结束后，冲突回避者 的成本会更明显：情绪不一定在当场爆发，但可能事后拖长。
zh-CN.strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。

en.title: Conflict Avoider in pressure recovery
en.typical_response: After after a demanding conversation or a high-contact work block, the cost of Conflict Avoider may become clearer: the emotion may not erupt in the moment, but it can linger afterward.
en.strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.better_move: Use a fixed closing routine: release the body, name the emotion, and list one unfinished item.

zh-CN.title: 关系边界中的先分析，后感受
zh-CN.typical_response: 当别人带着情绪找你，希望你给时间、安慰或解决方案时，你容易把情绪回应和责任承担混在一起，尤其当你的模式接近“先分析，后感受”时。
zh-CN.strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.better_move: 先承认对方感受，再说明自己能给出的支持范围。
zh-CN.micro_script: “我理解这件事很重。我现在能做的是……，但我不能替你承担全部。”

en.title: Analytical Before Feeling in relationship boundaries
en.typical_response: When someone comes to you with emotion and wants time, comfort, or a solution, emotional response and responsibility can blur together, especially with a pattern like Analytical Before Feeling.
en.strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.better_move: Acknowledge the feeling first, then name the kind of support you can realistically offer.
en.micro_script: “I can see this is heavy. What I can offer right now is..., but I cannot carry the whole thing for you.”

zh-CN.typical_response: 当别人带着情绪找你，希望你给时间、安慰或解决方案时，你容易把情绪回应和责任承担混在一起，尤其当你的模式接近“均衡但仍在打磨”时。
zh-CN.strength: 这一路径的优势在于你已经有一个可观察的情绪或关系资源。
zh-CN.cost: 如果没有明确练习，这个资源可能在压力下变形。
zh-CN.better_move: 先承认对方感受，再说明自己能给出的支持范围。
zh-CN.micro_script: “我理解这件事很重。我现在能做的是……，但我不能替你承担全部。”
zh-CN.reflection_question: 这次场景里，你最想保护的是事实、关系、还是自己的恢复空间？

en.title: Balanced, Still Sharpening in relationship boundaries
en.typical_response: When someone comes to you with emotion and wants time, comfort, or a solution, emotional response and responsibility can blur together, especially with a pattern like Balanced, Still Sharpening.
en.strength: The strength in this pattern is that there is already an observable emotional or relational resource.
en.cost: Without a clear practice, that resource can shift under pressure.
en.better_move: Acknowledge the feeling first, then name the kind of support you can realistically offer.
en.micro_script: “I can see this is heavy. What I can offer right now is..., but I cannot carry the whole thing for you.”
en.reflection_question: In this situation, what were you trying to protect: the facts, the relationship, or your own recovery space?

en.title: High Empathy, Low Recovery in relationship boundaries
